languages.text: [Указать на следы крови] "Здесь был отпрыск рода Гапрак. Говори, что вы с ним сделали!"

traits.locale_text: [Указать на следы крови] "Здесь был отпрыск рода Гапрак. Говори, что вы с ним сделали!"

languages.text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

languages.text: [Auf das Blut zeigen] "Der Gaprak-Spross war hier. Was habt Ihr mit ihm gemacht?"
languages.original_text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

traits.locale_text: [Auf das Blut zeigen] "Der Gaprak-Spross war hier. Was habt Ihr mit ihm gemacht?"

languages.text: 【指着血迹】“贾帕克家的子嗣来过这里。快说，你们把他怎么了？”
languages.original_text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

traits.locale_text: 【指着血迹】“贾帕克家的子嗣来过这里。快说，你们把他怎么了？”

languages.text: [Indiquer les traces de sang] « L'héritier des Gaprak était ici. Dites-moi ce que vous avez fait de lui ! »
languages.original_text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

traits.locale_text: [Indiquer les traces de sang] « L'héritier des Gaprak était ici. Dites-moi ce que vous avez fait de lui ! »

languages.text: [Señalar las manchas de sangre] «El heredero Gaprak ha estado aquí. ¡Cuénteme qué le ha hecho!».
languages.original_text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

traits.locale_text: [Señalar las manchas de sangre] «El heredero Gaprak ha estado aquí. ¡Cuénteme qué le ha hecho!».

languages.text: [Kan lekelerini işaret et] "Gaprak vârisi buradaydı. Söyle, ona ne yaptın?"
languages.original_text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

traits.locale_text: [Kan lekelerini işaret et] "Gaprak vârisi buradaydı. Söyle, ona ne yaptın?"

languages.text: [血痕を指さす]「ギャプラク家の跡取りがここにいた。彼に何をしたのかを話せ！」
languages.original_text: [Point at the bloodstains] "The Gaprak scion was here. Tell me what you have done to him!"

traits.locale_text: [血痕を指さす]「ギャプラク家の跡取りがここにいた。彼に何をしたのかを話せ！」
